content:
Softly—“They’re warm.”
Sanga blinked. “They’re stone.”
Horla shook her head. “Still. They feel warm.”
Horla stood, the box still open in her hand. “Will you put them in for me?”
“You want *those* in your hair?”
“I want *you* in my hair.”
Sanga groaned. “That’s something I would say.”
Horla smiled gently. “I know.”

embeds.description: Sanga placed the box on the table like it wasn’t worth handing over directly. Horla looked up from her page, her pen halted in the air, her fingers tapping a steady rhythm on it. She tilted her head, waiting. Sanga didn’t sit. “I made something,” she said, like it was a mistake she’d already regr...

'Tis morose to be stricken with the terminal illness known as "humanity"... come, we shall heal thy wretched form.

An English language fandub of the wonderful Clementine audio drama performance.

Unfortunately I was unable to isolate the original background track in time for this, but I hope you enjoy it nonetheless.
